title: LedgerMetadata
description: Metadata for a single BookKeeper ledger.

ensembleSize.description: Number of bookies in the ensemble.

writeQuorumSize.description: Number of bookies to write to per entry.

ackQuorumSize.description: Number of acks required before an entry is considered written.

state.description: State of the ledger (OPEN or CLOSED).

length.description: Total byte length of the ledger.

lastEntryId.description: ID of the last entry in the ledger.
